name: SCOBALL
NOTATION_PRICE_YEARLY
relations.query:
SELECT
    np.notation,
    np.notation || '-' || eoy.price_year AS id,
    np.day AS price_day,
    eoy.price_year,
    np."OPEN" AS open_value,
    np."CLOSE" AS close_value,
    np.previous AS previous_value
FROM scoball.notation_price np
     JOIN scoball.notation n
       ON np.notation = n.id
     JOIN scoball.stock s
       ON n.stock = s.id
     JOIN scoball.end_of_year_days eoy
       ON eoy.price_day = np.day
      AND eoy.stockexchange = s.stockexchange

name: SCOBALL
CORPORATION_LATEST_NAME
relations.query: SELECT corporation, corp_name FROM ( SELECT corporation, name AS corp_name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY corporation ORDER BY startdate DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn FROM scoball.corporation_name WHERE name IS NOT NULL ) sub WHERE rn = 1
